pi_items.source: task.json description (line 3) explicitly states: 'Name: DEPLOY_TARGET, Value: staging-cluster-01'. Also verified in task.json metadata (line 18) and used consistently in verifier.py (line 30) and setup_task.sh.

task.json description (line 3) explicitly states: 'Name: API_BASE_URL, Value: https://api.example.com/v2'. Also verified in task.json metadata (line 19) and used consistently in verifier.py (line 31). The domain 'example.com' is a reserved domain per RFC 2606/6761 used exclusively for documentation and examples.
task.json description (line 3) explicitly states: 'Name: BUILD_RETENTION_DAYS, Value: 30'. Also verified in task.json metadata (line 20) and used consistently in verifier.py (line 32).

task.json description (line 5) explicitly states: 'Create a new Freestyle project named exactly EnvVar-Verification-Job'. Also verified in task.json metadata (line 22) and used consistently in setup_task.sh (lines 30, 33, 36, 38) and export_result.sh (line 42) and verifier.py (line 34).

privileged_info_summary: This is a Jenkins global environment variable configuration task with synthetic example data. All metadata values are verified: DEPLOY_TARGET value is 'staging-cluster-01', API_BASE_URL value is 'https://api.example.com/v2' (using RFC 2606/6761 reserved domain for examples), BUILD_RETENTION_DAYS value is '30', and the verification job name is exactly 'EnvVar-Verification-Job'. All metadata values are explicitly documented in the task description and are used consistently throughout the task setup, verification, and export scripts.
